name: One Bowl Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 package BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate (8 squares each)
recipeInstructions:
1. MICROWAVE chocolate and milk in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2-3 minutes or until the chocolate is almost melted, stirring halfway through the heating time.
2. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. STIR in vanilla.
4. Spread in a foil-lined 8-inch square pan.
5. Drop peanut butter by teaspoonfuls on top of the fudge.
6. SWIRL with a knife to marbleize.
7. REFRIGERATE for 2 hours or until firm. Cut into squares.
